Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Douglas Gary.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Janet Tapia is present.
Attorney Kelly McCoy representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Ronald E. Quidachay , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May-7-2012 remains on calendar. (501/REQ)
